content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Feb 22, 2026)
## OVERVIEW 
Today's development focused on new pull requests, including documentation for wallet safety, dependency updates, and a new feature for SQL plugin isolation.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

No completed work was reported for this period.

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
- A new pull request, [#6523](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6523), was opened to add a Base Network wallet safety guide with x402 diagnostic.
- Another pull request, [#6522](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6522), was opened to bump the npm_and_yarn group across 3 directories with 4 updates.
- A feature pull request, [#6521](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6521), was opened to align RLS isolation with v1 patterns in the SQL plugin.

## CLOSED ISSUES

No issues were closed today.

## NEW ISSUES

No new issues were reported today.

## ACTIVE ISSUES

No active issues with more than 3 comments were reported today.
